body.body: Tenant management is a platform-level operation and is not available through the web UI.

body.tpl: Use the Awo CLI to create and manage tenants. The following commands are available:

# Create a new tenant
awo tenant create --name "Acme Corp" --slug acme --plan standard

# List all tenants
awo tenant list

# Get tenant details
awo tenant get --slug acme

# Suspend a tenant
awo tenant suspend --slug acme

# Delete a tenant (irreversible)
awo tenant delete --slug acme --confirm
Run awo tenant --help for the full list of options and flags.
